LightningComponentBundle.description: Collects a free-text input, combines it with the current record, resolves a flex Prompt Builder template, and displays the generated response.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Heading shown at the top of the card.

property.name: helpText
property.label: Help Text
property.default: Describe your outreach goal, then generate a tailored email grounded in this account.

property.name: inputLabel
property.label: Input Label
property.description: Label for the free-text field the user fills in.

property.name: inputPlaceholder
property.label: Input Placeholder
property.default: e.g. Introduce our onboarding services and request a 15-minute intro call

property.name: iconName
property.label: Card Icon
property.description: SLDS icon name shown in the card header, e.g. standard:email.

property.name: templateName
property.label: Prompt Template API Name
property.description: Developer name of the flex prompt template to resolve.

property.name: recordInputName
property.label: Record Input Name
property.description: Reference name of the record input the template expects, e.g. Input:Account.

property.name: freeTextInputName
property.label: Free-Text Input Name
property.description: Reference name of the free-text input the template expects, e.g. Input:Outreach_Goal.
